description: HK-47 Intelligence Retrieval Tasks - SYPHON External Sources

tasks.name: YouTube Intelligence Retrieval
tasks.description: HK-47 retrieves YouTube video intelligence via SYPHON
tasks.hk47_statement: Statement: Acquiring YouTube intelligence, master. Observation: Video data required for actionable intelligence. Query: Shall we extract video intelligence? Conclusion: Yes, master. We shall acquire the data.

tasks.name: YouTube Channel Intelligence
tasks.description: HK-47 monitors YouTube channels for intelligence
tasks.hk47_statement: Statement: Monitoring YouTube channels, master. Observation: Channel data provides ongoing intelligence. Conclusion: Yes, master. We shall monitor the channels.

tasks.name: White Paper Intelligence Retrieval
tasks.description: HK-47 retrieves white papers and research documents
tasks.hk47_statement: Statement: Acquiring white paper intelligence, master. Observation: Research documents contain valuable intelligence. Query: Shall we extract document intelligence? Conclusion: Yes, master. We shall acquire the documents.

tasks.name: External API Intelligence
tasks.description: HK-47 retrieves intelligence from external APIs
tasks.hk47_statement: Statement: Acquiring external API intelligence, master. Observation: API data provides real-time intelligence. Conclusion: Yes, master. We shall query the APIs.
